678: export async function createCheckpointJob(
679:   db: D1Database,
680:   input: CreateCheckpointJobInput
681: ): Promise<JobResponse> {
682:   const result = await db
683:     .prepare(
684:       `INSERT INTO jobs (
685:          id,
686:          prompt,
687:          model,
688:          status,
689:          phase,
690:          source_type,
691:          checkpoint_id,
692:          commit_sha,
693:          source_ref,
694:          source_project_root,
695:          build_run_tests_if_present,
696:          build_run_lint_if_present,
697:          source_bundle_key,
698:          source_bundle_sha256,
699:          source_bundle_bytes
700:        )
701:        VALUES (?, ?, 'checkpoint', 'queued', 'queued', 'checkpoint', ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
702:        RETURNING *`
703:     )
704:     .bind(
705:       input.id,
706:       input.prompt,
707:       input.checkpointId,
708:       input.commitSha,
709:       input.sourceRef ?? null,
710:       input.sourceProjectRoot ?? null,
711:       input.buildRunTestsIfPresent ? 1 : 0,
712:       input.buildRunLintIfPresent ? 1 : 0,
713:       input.sourceBundleKey,
714:       input.sourceBundleSha256,
715:       input.sourceBundleBytes
716:     )
717:     .first<JobRecord>();
718: 
719:   if (!result) {
720:     throw new Error('Failed to create checkpoint job');
721:   }
722: 
723:   return toJobResponse(result);

761: /**
762:  * Atomically claim a queued checkpoint job for execution.
763:  * Returns true when claim succeeds, false when another worker already claimed.
764:  */
765: export async function claimQueuedCheckpointJob(db: D1Database, id: string): Promise<boolean> {
766:   const result = await db
767:     .prepare(
768:       `UPDATE jobs
769:        SET status = 'running',
770:            phase = 'building',
771:            started_at = ?,
772:            error_message = NULL,
773:            error_code = NULL
774:        WHERE id = ? AND status = 'queued'`
775:     )
776:     .bind(new Date().toISOString(), id)
777:     .run();
778: 
779:   const changes = Number((result as { meta?: { changes?: number } }).meta?.changes ?? 0);
780:   return changes > 0;
781: }

783: /**
784:  * Append a sequenced job event and return its sequence number.
785:  */
786: export async function appendJobEvent(
787:   db: D1Database,
788:   input: {
789:     jobId: string;
790:     attemptNo?: number;
791:     eventType: string;
792:     phase: JobPhase;
793:     payload: unknown;
794:   }
795: ): Promise<number> {
796:   const sequenceResult = await db
797:     .prepare('UPDATE jobs SET last_event_seq = last_event_seq + 1 WHERE id = ? RETURNING last_event_seq')
798:     .bind(input.jobId)
799:     .first<{ last_event_seq: number }>();
800: 
801:   if (!sequenceResult) {
802:     throw new Error(`Failed to allocate event sequence for job ${input.jobId}`);
803:   }
804: 
805:   const seq = Number(sequenceResult.last_event_seq);
806:   await db
807:     .prepare(
808:       `INSERT INTO job_events (job_id, attempt_no, seq, event_type, phase, payload_json)
809:        VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`
810:     )
811:     .bind(
812:       input.jobId,
813:       input.attemptNo ?? 0,
814:       seq,
815:       input.eventType,
816:       input.phase,
817:       JSON.stringify(input.payload)
818:     )
819:     .run();
820: 
821:   return seq;
822: }
823: 
824: /**
825:  * List persisted job events from a given sequence.
826:  */
827: export async function listJobEvents(
828:   db: D1Database,
829:   jobId: string,
830:   fromExclusive = 0,
831:   limit = 500
832: ): Promise<JobEventItem[]> {
833:   const result = await db
834:     .prepare(
835:       `SELECT id, job_id, attempt_no, seq, event_type, phase, payload_json, created_at
836:        FROM job_events
837:        WHERE job_id = ? AND seq > ?
838:        ORDER BY seq ASC
839:        LIMIT ?`
840:     )
841:     .bind(jobId, fromExclusive, limit)
842:     .all<JobEventRecord>();
843: 
844:   return result.results.map((row) => {
845:     let payload: unknown;
846:     try {
847:       payload = JSON.parse(row.payload_json);
848:     } catch {
849:       payload = { raw: row.payload_json };
850:     }
851: 
852:     return {
853:       seq: row.seq,
854:       eventType: row.event_type,
855:       phase: row.phase,
856:       payload,
857:       createdAt: row.created_at,
858:     };
859:   });
860: }

862: /**
863:  * Update job status
864:  */
865: export async function updateJobStatus(
866:   db: D1Database,
867:   id: string,
868:   status: JobStatus,
869:   additionalFields?: {
870:     phase?: JobPhase;
871:     started_at?: string | null;
872:     completed_at?: string | null;
873:     cancel_requested_at?: string | null;
874:     cancelled_at?: string | null;
875:     preview_url?: string;
876:     deployed_url?: string;
877:     code_url?: string;
878:     code_zip_url?: string;
879:     error_message?: string | null;
880:     error_code?: string | null;
881:     retry_count?: number;
882:     file_count?: number;
883:     // Metrics fields
884:     prompt_tokens?: number;
885:     completion_tokens?: number;
886:     total_tokens?: number;
887:     cost?: number;
888:     llm_latency_ms?: number;
889:     install_duration_ms?: number;
890:     build_duration_ms?: number;
891:     deploy_duration_ms?: number;
892:     total_duration_ms?: number;
893:     lines_of_code?: number;
894:   }
895: ): Promise<void> {
896:   const updates: string[] = ['status = ?'];
897:   const values: (string | number | null)[] = [status];
898: 
899:   if (additionalFields) {
900:     if (additionalFields.phase !== undefined) {
901:       updates.push('phase = ?');
902:       values.push(additionalFields.phase);
903:     }
904:     if (additionalFields.started_at !== undefined) {
905:       updates.push('started_at = ?');
906:       values.push(additionalFields.started_at);
907:     }
908:     if (additionalFields.completed_at !== undefined) {
909:       updates.push('completed_at = ?');
910:       values.push(additionalFields.completed_at);
911:     }
912:     if (additionalFields.cancel_requested_at !== undefined) {
913:       updates.push('cancel_requested_at = ?');
914:       values.push(additionalFields.cancel_requested_at);
915:     }
916:     if (additionalFields.cancelled_at !== undefined) {
917:       updates.push('cancelled_at = ?');
918:       values.push(additionalFields.cancelled_at);
919:     }
920:     if (additionalFields.preview_url !== undefined) {
921:       updates.push('preview_url = ?');
922:       values.push(additionalFields.preview_url);
923:     }
924:     if (additionalFields.deployed_url !== undefined) {
925:       updates.push('deployed_url = ?');
926:       values.push(additionalFields.deployed_url);
927:     }
928:     if (additionalFields.code_url !== undefined) {
929:       updates.push('code_url = ?');
930:       values.push(additionalFields.code_url);
931:     }
932:     if (additionalFields.code_zip_url !== undefined) {
933:       updates.push('code_zip_url = ?');
934:       values.push(additionalFields.code_zip_url);
935:     }
936:     if (additionalFields.error_message !== undefined) {
937:       updates.push('error_message = ?');
938:       values.push(additionalFields.error_message);
939:     }
940:     if (additionalFields.error_code !== undefined) {
941:       updates.push('error_code = ?');
942:       values.push(additionalFields.error_code);
943:     }
944:     if (additionalFields.retry_count !== undefined) {
945:       updates.push('retry_count = ?');
946:       values.push(additionalFields.retry_count);
947:     }
948:     if (additionalFields.file_count !== undefined) {
949:       updates.push('file_count = ?');
950:       values.push(additionalFields.file_count);
951:     }
952:     // Metrics fields
953:     if (additionalFields.prompt_tokens !== undefined) {
954:       updates.push('prompt_tokens = ?');
955:       values.push(additionalFields.prompt_tokens);
956:     }
957:     if (additionalFields.completion_tokens !== undefined) {
958:       updates.push('completion_tokens = ?');
959:       values.push(additionalFields.completion_tokens);
960:     }
961:     if (additionalFields.total_tokens !== undefined) {
962:       updates.push('total_tokens = ?');
963:       values.push(additionalFields.total_tokens);
964:     }
965:     if (additionalFields.cost !== undefined) {
966:       updates.push('cost = ?');
967:       values.push(additionalFields.cost);
968:     }
969:     if (additionalFields.llm_latency_ms !== undefined) {
970:       updates.push('llm_latency_ms = ?');
971:       values.push(additionalFields.llm_latency_ms);
972:     }
973:     if (additionalFields.install_duration_ms !== undefined) {
974:       updates.push('install_duration_ms = ?');
975:       values.push(additionalFields.install_duration_ms);
976:     }
977:     if (additionalFields.build_duration_ms !== undefined) {
978:       updates.push('build_duration_ms = ?');
979:       values.push(additionalFields.build_duration_ms);
980:     }
981:     if (additionalFields.deploy_duration_ms !== undefined) {
982:       updates.push('deploy_duration_ms = ?');
983:       values.push(additionalFields.deploy_duration_ms);
984:     }
985:     if (additionalFields.total_duration_ms !== undefined) {
986:       updates.push('total_duration_ms = ?');
987:       values.push(additionalFields.total_duration_ms);
988:     }
989:     if (additionalFields.lines_of_code !== undefined) {
990:       updates.push('lines_of_code = ?');
991:       values.push(additionalFields.lines_of_code);
992:     }
993:   }
994: 
995:   values.push(id);
996: 
997:   await db
998:     .prepare(`UPDATE jobs SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE id = ?`)
999:     .bind(...values)
1000:     .run();
1001: }

1076: /**
1077:  * Update workspace status and selected metadata.
1078:  */
1079: export async function updateWorkspaceStatus(
1080:   db: D1Database,
1081:   id: string,
1082:   status: WorkspaceStatus,
1083:   additionalFields?: {
1084:     baseline_ready?: number;
1085:     deleted_at?: string | null;
1086:     error_code?: string | null;
1087:     error_message?: string | null;
1088:   },
1089:   options?: {
1090:     ifNotDeleted?: boolean;
1091:   }
1092: ): Promise<boolean> {
1093:   const updates: string[] = ['status = ?', 'updated_at = ?'];
1094:   const values: (string | number | null)[] = [status, new Date().toISOString()];
1095: 
1096:   if (additionalFields) {
1097:     if (additionalFields.baseline_ready !== undefined) {
1098:       updates.push('baseline_ready = ?');
1099:       values.push(additionalFields.baseline_ready);
1100:     }
1101:     if (additionalFields.deleted_at !== undefined) {
1102:       updates.push('deleted_at = ?');
1103:       values.push(additionalFields.deleted_at);
1104:     }
1105:     if (additionalFields.error_code !== undefined) {
1106:       updates.push('error_code = ?');
1107:       values.push(additionalFields.error_code);
1108:     }
1109:     if (additionalFields.error_message !== undefined) {
1110:       updates.push('error_message = ?');
1111:       values.push(additionalFields.error_message);
1112:     }
1113:   }
1114: 
1115:   values.push(id);
1116: 
1117:   let whereClause = 'id = ?';
1118:   if (options?.ifNotDeleted) {
1119:     whereClause += " AND status != 'deleted'";
1120:   }
1121: 
1122:   const result = await db
1123:     .prepare(`UPDATE workspaces SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE ${whereClause}`)
1124:     .bind(...values)
1125:     .run();
1126: 
1127:   return Number(result.meta.changes ?? 0) > 0;
1128: }

1130: /**

1147: /**

1177: /**
1178:  * Append a sequenced workspace event and return sequence number.
1179:  */
1180: export async function appendWorkspaceEvent(
1181:   db: D1Database,
1182:   input: {
1183:     workspaceId: string;
1184:     eventType: string;
1185:     payload: unknown;
1186:   }
1187: ): Promise<number> {
1188:   const sequenceResult = await db
1189:     .prepare('UPDATE workspaces SET last_event_seq = last_event_seq + 1 WHERE id = ? RETURNING last_event_seq')
1190:     .bind(input.workspaceId)
1191:     .first<{ last_event_seq: number }>();
1192: 
1193:   if (!sequenceResult) {
1194:     throw new Error(`Failed to allocate event sequence for workspace ${input.workspaceId}`);
1195:   }
1196: 
1197:   const seq = Number(sequenceResult.last_event_seq);
1198:   await db
1199:     .prepare(
1200:       `INSERT INTO workspace_events (workspace_id, seq, event_type, payload_json)
1201:        VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)`
1202:     )
1203:     .bind(input.workspaceId, seq, input.eventType, JSON.stringify(input.payload))
1204:     .run();
1205: 
1206:   return seq;
1207: }
1208: 
1209: /**
1210:  * List persisted workspace events from a given sequence.
1211:  */
1212: export async function listWorkspaceEvents(
1213:   db: D1Database,
1214:   workspaceId: string,
1215:   fromExclusive = 0,
1216:   limit = 500
1217: ): Promise<WorkspaceEventItem[]> {
1218:   const result = await db
1219:     .prepare(
1220:       `SELECT seq, event_type, payload_json, created_at
1221:        FROM workspace_events
1222:        WHERE workspace_id = ? AND seq > ?
1223:        ORDER BY seq ASC
1224:        LIMIT ?`
1225:     )
1226:     .bind(workspaceId, fromExclusive, limit)
1227:     .all<WorkspaceEventRecord>();
1228: 
1229:   return result.results.map((row) => {
1230:     let payload: unknown;
1231:     try {
1232:       payload = JSON.parse(row.payload_json);
1233:     } catch {
1234:       payload = { raw: row.payload_json };
1235:     }
1236: 
1237:     return {
1238:       seq: row.seq,
1239:       eventType: row.event_type,
1240:       payload,
1241:       createdAt: row.created_at,
1242:     };
1243:   });
1244: }

1246: export async function createWorkspaceOperation(
1247:   db: D1Database,
1248:   input: CreateWorkspaceOperationInput
1249: ): Promise<{ operation: WorkspaceOperationResponse; reused: boolean }> {
1250:   const now = new Date().toISOString();
1251:   const existingIdempotency = await db
1252:     .prepare(
1253:       `SELECT operation_id, request_payload_sha256, expires_at
1254:        FROM workspace_operation_idempotency
1255:        WHERE workspace_id = ? AND operation_type = ? AND idempotency_key = ?
1256:        LIMIT 1`
1257:     )
1258:     .bind(input.workspaceId, input.type, input.idempotencyKey)
1259:     .first<{ operation_id: string; request_payload_sha256: string; expires_at: string }>();
1260: 
1261:   if (existingIdempotency && existingIdempotency.expires_at > now) {
1262:     if (existingIdempotency.request_payload_sha256 !== input.requestPayloadSha256) {
1263:       throw new WorkspaceIdempotencyConflictError(input.idempotencyKey, input.type);
1264:     }
1265: 
1266:     const existingOperation = await getWorkspaceOperation(db, input.workspaceId, existingIdempotency.operation_id);
1267:     if (!existingOperation) {
1268:       throw new Error(`Idempotency record references missing operation ${existingIdempotency.operation_id}`);
1269:     }
1270:     return { operation: existingOperation, reused: true };
1271:   }
1272: 
1273:   if (existingIdempotency && existingIdempotency.expires_at <= now) {
1274:     await db
1275:       .prepare(
1276:         `DELETE FROM workspace_operation_idempotency
1277:          WHERE workspace_id = ? AND operation_type = ? AND idempotency_key = ?`
1278:       )
1279:       .bind(input.workspaceId, input.type, input.idempotencyKey)
1280:       .run();
1281:   }
1282: 
1283:   const expiresAt = new Date(Date.now() + 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();
1284:   const operationId = input.id;
1285: 
1286:   const operationRecord = await db
1287:     .prepare(
1288:       `INSERT INTO workspace_operations (
1289:          id,
1290:          workspace_id,
1291:          type,
1292:          status,
1293:          actor_id,
1294:          auth_principal_json,
1295:          request_payload_json,
1296:          request_payload_sha256,
1297:          idempotency_key,
1298:          warnings_json
1299:        )
1300:        VALUES (?, ?, ?, 'queued', ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, '[]')
1301:        RETURNING *`
1302:     )
1303:     .bind(
1304:       operationId,
1305:       input.workspaceId,
1306:       input.type,
1307:       input.actorId ?? null,
1308:       JSON.stringify(input.authPrincipal ?? {}),
1309:       JSON.stringify(input.requestPayload ?? {}),
1310:       input.requestPayloadSha256,
1311:       input.idempotencyKey
1312:     )
1313:     .first<WorkspaceOperationRecord>();
1314: 
1315:   if (!operationRecord) {
1316:     throw new Error('Failed to create workspace operation');
1317:   }
1318: 
1319:   try {
1320:     await db
1321:       .prepare(
1322:         `INSERT INTO workspace_operation_idempotency (
1323:            id,
1324:            workspace_id,
1325:            operation_type,
1326:            idempotency_key,
1327:            operation_id,
1328:            request_payload_sha256,
1329:            expires_at
1330:          )
1331:          VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`
1332:       )
1333:       .bind(
1334:         generatePrefixedId('wopk'),
1335:         input.workspaceId,
1336:         input.type,
1337:         input.idempotencyKey,
1338:         operationId,
1339:         input.requestPayloadSha256,
1340:         expiresAt
1341:       )
1342:       .run();
1343:   } catch (error) {
1344:     if (!isUniqueConstraintError(error)) {
1345:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_operations WHERE id = ?').bind(operationId).run();
1346:       throw error;
1347:     }
1348: 
1349:     const concurrentIdempotency = await db
1350:       .prepare(
1351:         `SELECT operation_id, request_payload_sha256, expires_at
1352:          FROM workspace_operation_idempotency
1353:          WHERE workspace_id = ? AND operation_type = ? AND idempotency_key = ?
1354:          LIMIT 1`
1355:       )
1356:       .bind(input.workspaceId, input.type, input.idempotencyKey)
1357:       .first<{ operation_id: string; request_payload_sha256: string; expires_at: string }>();
1358: 
1359:     if (!concurrentIdempotency || concurrentIdempotency.expires_at <= now) {
1360:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_operations WHERE id = ?').bind(operationId).run();
1361:       throw new Error('Idempotency race detected but winner record is unavailable');
1362:     }
1363:     if (concurrentIdempotency.request_payload_sha256 !== input.requestPayloadSha256) {
1364:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_operations WHERE id = ?').bind(operationId).run();
1365:       throw new WorkspaceIdempotencyConflictError(input.idempotencyKey, input.type);
1366:     }
1367: 
1368:     const existingOperation = await getWorkspaceOperation(db, input.workspaceId, concurrentIdempotency.operation_id);
1369:     if (!existingOperation) {
1370:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_operations WHERE id = ?').bind(operationId).run();
1371:       throw new Error(`Idempotency record references missing operation ${concurrentIdempotency.operation_id}`);
1372:     }
1373:     await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_operations WHERE id = ?').bind(operationId).run();
1374:     return { operation: existingOperation, reused: true };
1375:   }
1376: 
1377:   return { operation: toWorkspaceOperationResponse(operationRecord), reused: false };
1378: }
1379: 
1380: export async function getWorkspaceOperation(
1381:   db: D1Database,
1382:   workspaceId: string,
1383:   operationId: string
1384: ): Promise<WorkspaceOperationResponse | null> {
1385:   const result = await db
1386:     .prepare('SELECT * FROM workspace_operations WHERE id = ? AND workspace_id = ?')
1387:     .bind(operationId, workspaceId)
1388:     .first<WorkspaceOperationRecord>();
1389: 
1390:   if (!result) {
1391:     return null;
1392:   }
1393: 
1394:   return toWorkspaceOperationResponse(result);
1395: }

1397: export async function claimWorkspaceOperationForExecution(
1398:   db: D1Database,
1399:   workspaceId: string,
1400:   operationId: string
1401: ): Promise<boolean> {
1402:   const startedAt = new Date().toISOString();
1403:   const result = await db
1404:     .prepare(
1405:       `UPDATE workspace_operations
1406:        SET status = 'running',
1407:            started_at = COALESCE(started_at, ?),
1408:            updated_at = ?
1409:        WHERE id = ? AND workspace_id = ? AND status = 'queued'`
1410:     )
1411:     .bind(startedAt, startedAt, operationId, workspaceId)
1412:     .run();
1413: 
1414:   return (result.meta?.changes ?? 0) > 0;
1415: }
1416: 
1417: export async function updateWorkspaceOperationStatus(
1418:   db: D1Database,
1419:   operationId: string,
1420:   status: WorkspaceOperationStatus,
1421:   options?: {
1422:     result?: unknown;
1423:     warnings?: unknown[];
1424:     errorCode?: string | null;
1425:     errorClass?: string | null;
1426:     errorMessage?: string | null;
1427:     errorDetails?: unknown;
1428:     startedAt?: string | null;
1429:     finishedAt?: string | null;
1430:   }
1431: ): Promise<void> {
1432:   const updates: string[] = ['status = ?', 'updated_at = ?'];
1433:   const values: Array<string | number | null> = [status, new Date().toISOString()];
1434: 
1435:   if (options?.startedAt !== undefined) {
1436:     updates.push('started_at = ?');
1437:     values.push(options.startedAt);
1438:   }
1439:   if (options?.finishedAt !== undefined) {
1440:     updates.push('finished_at = ?');
1441:     values.push(options.finishedAt);
1442:   }
1443:   if (options?.result !== undefined) {
1444:     updates.push('result_json = ?');
1445:     values.push(JSON.stringify(options.result));
1446:   }
1447:   if (options?.warnings !== undefined) {
1448:     updates.push('warnings_json = ?');
1449:     values.push(JSON.stringify(options.warnings));
1450:   }
1451:   if (options?.errorCode !== undefined) {
1452:     updates.push('error_code = ?');
1453:     values.push(options.errorCode);
1454:   }
1455:   if (options?.errorClass !== undefined) {
1456:     updates.push('error_class = ?');
1457:     values.push(options.errorClass);
1458:   }
1459:   if (options?.errorMessage !== undefined) {
1460:     updates.push('error_message = ?');
1461:     values.push(options.errorMessage);
1462:   }
1463:   if (options?.errorDetails !== undefined) {
1464:     updates.push('error_details_json = ?');
1465:     values.push(JSON.stringify(options.errorDetails));
1466:   }
1467:   if (status === 'running') {
1468:     updates.push('started_at = COALESCE(started_at, ?)');
1469:     values.push(new Date().toISOString());
1470:   }
1471:   if (status === 'succeeded' || status === 'failed') {
1472:     updates.push('finished_at = COALESCE(finished_at, ?)');
1473:     values.push(new Date().toISOString());
1474:     updates.push('duration_ms = CASE WHEN started_at IS NULL OR COALESCE(finished_at, ?) IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CAST((julianday(COALESCE(finished_at, ?)) - julianday(started_at)) * 86400000 AS INTEGER) END');
1475:     const finishedAtForDuration = new Date().toISOString();
1476:     values.push(finishedAtForDuration, finishedAtForDuration);
1477:   }
1478: 
1479:   values.push(operationId);
1480: 
1481:   await db
1482:     .prepare(`UPDATE workspace_operations SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE id = ?`)
1483:     .bind(...values)
1484:     .run();
1485: }

1580: export async function createWorkspaceTask(
1581:   db: D1Database,
1582:   input: CreateWorkspaceTaskInput
1583: ): Promise<{ task: WorkspaceTaskResponse; reused: boolean }> {
1584:   const now = new Date().toISOString();
1585:   const existingIdempotency = await db
1586:     .prepare(
1587:       `SELECT task_id, request_payload_sha256, expires_at
1588:        FROM workspace_task_idempotency
1589:        WHERE workspace_id = ? AND idempotency_key = ?
1590:        LIMIT 1`
1591:     )
1592:     .bind(input.workspaceId, input.idempotencyKey)
1593:     .first<{ task_id: string; request_payload_sha256: string; expires_at: string }>();
1594: 
1595:   if (existingIdempotency && existingIdempotency.expires_at > now) {
1596:     if (existingIdempotency.request_payload_sha256 !== input.requestPayloadSha256) {
1597:       throw new WorkspaceTaskIdempotencyConflictError(input.idempotencyKey);
1598:     }
1599: 
1600:     const existingTask = await getWorkspaceTask(db, input.workspaceId, existingIdempotency.task_id);
1601:     if (!existingTask) {
1602:       throw new Error(`Idempotency record references missing task ${existingIdempotency.task_id}`);
1603:     }
1604: 
1605:     return { task: existingTask, reused: true };
1606:   }
1607: 
1608:   if (existingIdempotency && existingIdempotency.expires_at <= now) {
1609:     await db
1610:       .prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_task_idempotency WHERE workspace_id = ? AND idempotency_key = ?')
1611:       .bind(input.workspaceId, input.idempotencyKey)
1612:       .run();
1613:   }
1614: 
1615:   const expiresAt = new Date(Date.now() + 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();
1616:   const taskRecord = await db
1617:     .prepare(
1618:       `INSERT INTO workspace_tasks (
1619:          id,
1620:          workspace_id,
1621:          status,
1622:          prompt,
1623:          provider,
1624:          model,
1625:          idempotency_key,
1626:          request_payload_json,
1627:          request_payload_sha256,
1628:          max_steps,
1629:          max_retries,
1630:          actor_id,
1631:          tool_policy_json
1632:        )
1633:        VALUES (?, ?, 'queued', ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
1634:        RETURNING *`
1635:     )
1636:     .bind(
1637:       input.id,
1638:       input.workspaceId,
1639:       input.prompt,
1640:       input.provider,
1641:       input.model,
1642:       input.idempotencyKey,
1643:       JSON.stringify(input.requestPayload ?? {}),
1644:       input.requestPayloadSha256,
1645:       input.maxSteps,
1646:       input.maxRetries,
1647:       input.actorId ?? null,
1648:       JSON.stringify(input.toolPolicy ?? {})
1649:     )
1650:     .first<WorkspaceTaskRecord>();
1651: 
1652:   if (!taskRecord) {
1653:     throw new Error('Failed to create workspace task');
1654:   }
1655: 
1656:   try {
1657:     await db
1658:       .prepare(
1659:         `INSERT INTO workspace_task_idempotency (
1660:            id,
1661:            workspace_id,
1662:            idempotency_key,
1663:            task_id,
1664:            request_payload_sha256,
1665:            expires_at
1666:          )
1667:          VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`
1668:       )
1669:       .bind(
1670:         generatePrefixedId('wtsk'),
1671:         input.workspaceId,
1672:         input.idempotencyKey,
1673:         input.id,
1674:         input.requestPayloadSha256,
1675:         expiresAt
1676:       )
1677:       .run();
1678:   } catch (error) {
1679:     if (!isUniqueConstraintError(error)) {
1680:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_tasks WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
1681:       throw error;
1682:     }
1683: 
1684:     const concurrent = await db
1685:       .prepare(
1686:         `SELECT task_id, request_payload_sha256, expires_at
1687:          FROM workspace_task_idempotency
1688:          WHERE workspace_id = ? AND idempotency_key = ?
1689:          LIMIT 1`
1690:       )
1691:       .bind(input.workspaceId, input.idempotencyKey)
1692:       .first<{ task_id: string; request_payload_sha256: string; expires_at: string }>();
1693: 
1694:     if (!concurrent || concurrent.expires_at <= now) {
1695:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_tasks WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
1696:       throw new Error('Task idempotency race detected but winner record is unavailable');
1697:     }
1698: 
1699:     if (concurrent.request_payload_sha256 !== input.requestPayloadSha256) {
1700:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_tasks WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
1701:       throw new WorkspaceTaskIdempotencyConflictError(input.idempotencyKey);
1702:     }
1703: 
1704:     const existingTask = await getWorkspaceTask(db, input.workspaceId, concurrent.task_id);
1705:     if (!existingTask) {
1706:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_tasks WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
1707:       throw new Error(`Idempotency record references missing task ${concurrent.task_id}`);
1708:     }
1709: 
1710:     await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_tasks WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
1711:     return { task: existingTask, reused: true };
1712:   }
1713: 
1714:   return { task: toWorkspaceTaskResponse(taskRecord), reused: false };
1715: }

581:       }
582:       try {
583:         const metadata = JSON.parse(decoded) as unknown;
584:         for (const path of parseTouchedFilesFromMetadata(asRecord(metadata))) {
585:           touchedFiles.add(path);
586:         }
587:       } catch {
588:         continue;
589:       }
590:     }
591: 
592:     if (touchedFiles.size === 0) {
593:       continue;
594:     }
595: 
596:     sessionsScanned += 1;
597:     const matchesChanged = Array.from(touchedFiles).some((path) => changedSet.has(path));
598:     if (!matchesChanged) {
599:       continue;
600:     }
601: 
602:     for (const path of touchedFiles) {
603:       if (changedSet.has(path)) {
604:         continue;
605:       }
606:       const next = frequency.get(path) ?? { count: 0, sessions: new Set<string>() };
607:       next.count += 1;
608:       next.sessions.add(sha);
609:       frequency.set(path, next);
610:     }
611:   }
612: 
613:   const related = Array.from(frequency.entries())
614:     .map(([path, value]) => ({
615:       path,
616:       frequency: value.count,
617:       sessionIds: Array.from(value.sessions),
618:     }))
619:     .sort((left, right) => right.frequency - left.frequency);
620: 
621:   return {
622:     related,
623:     sessionsScanned,
624:   };
625: }
626: 
627: async function assembleReviewContextBootstrap(
628:   env: Env,
629:   review: ReviewRunResponse
630: ): Promise<ReviewContext> {
631:   const COCHANGE_LOOKBACK_SESSIONS = 5;
632:   const COCHANGE_TOP_N = 20;
633:   const CONVENTION_FILE_MAX_COUNT = 10;
634: 
635:   await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
636:     reviewId: review.id,
637:     eventType: 'review_context_assembly_started',
638:     payload: {
639:       source: 'entire/checkpoints/v1',
640:     },
641:   });
642: 
643:   const workspace = await getWorkspace(env.DB, review.workspaceId);
644:   const checkpointId = workspace?.checkpointId?.trim() ?? '';
645:   if (!checkpointId) {
646:     throw new ReviewContextAssemblyError(
647:       'unsupported_without_entire_checkpoint_context',
648:       'Review context assembly requires an Entire checkpoint-backed workspace with a checkpointId.'
649:     );
650:   }
651: 
652:   const deployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, review.workspaceId, review.deploymentId);
653:   if (!deployment) {
654:     throw new ReviewContextAssemblyError('review_context_deployment_not_found', `Deployment ${review.deploymentId} was not found.`);
655:   }
656: 
657:   const deploymentRequest = (await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, review.deploymentId)) ?? {};
658:   const requestProvenance = asRecord(deploymentRequest.provenance);
659:   const sessionIds = uniqueStrings(parseStringArray(requestProvenance.sessionIds));
660:   if (sessionIds.length === 0) {
661:     throw new ReviewContextAssemblyError(
662:       'unsupported_without_entire_checkpoint_context',
663:       'Review context assembly requires at least one Entire sessionId in deployment provenance.'
664:     );
665:   }
666: 
667:   const sessionId = sessionIds[0] ?? '';
668:   const sessionIntentCandidates = uniqueStrings(parseStringArray(requestProvenance.intentSessionContext));
669:   const sessionIntent = sessionIntentCandidates[0] ?? null;
670:   const attributionTrailer = readOptionalString(requestProvenance.attributionTrailer);
671:   const agentType = readOptionalString(requestProvenance.agentType);
672:   const tokenBudget =
673:     readOptionalNumber(requestProvenance.reviewContextTokenBudget) ??
674:     readOptionalNumber(requestProvenance.contextTokenBudget) ??
675:     null;
676: 
677:   await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
678:     reviewId: review.id,
679:     eventType: 'review_context_checkpoint_context_collected',
680:     payload: {
681:       checkpointId,
682:       sessionId,
683:       sessionCount: sessionIds.length,
684:       hasSessionIntent: Boolean(sessionIntent),
685:     },
686:   });
687: 
688:   const result = asRecord(deployment.result);
689:   const resultProvenance = asRecord(result.provenance);
690:   const resultArtifact = asRecord(result.artifact);
691:   const provenanceOperationId = typeof resultProvenance.operationId === 'string'
692:     ? resultProvenance.operationId
693:     : typeof requestProvenance.operationId === 'string'
694:       ? requestProvenance.operationId
695:       : null;
696:   const reviewDiffArtifactId = typeof resultArtifact.reviewDiffArtifactId === 'string'
697:     ? resultArtifact.reviewDiffArtifactId
698:     : typeof resultProvenance.reviewDiffArtifactId === 'string'
699:       ? resultProvenance.reviewDiffArtifactId
700:       : typeof requestProvenance.reviewDiffArtifactId === 'string'
701:         ? requestProvenance.reviewDiffArtifactId
702:         : null;
703: 
704:   const authoritativeDiff = await loadAuthoritativeDeploymentDiff(
705:     env,
706:     review.workspaceId,
707:     provenanceOperationId,
708:     reviewDiffArtifactId
709:   );
710:   const diffPatch = authoritativeDiff?.patch ?? null;
711:   const changedPaths = diffPatch ? parseChangedPathsFromDiff(diffPatch) : [];
712:   const diffHunks = diffPatch ? parseDiffHunks(diffPatch) : [];
713: 
714:   await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
715:     reviewId: review.id,
716:     eventType: 'review_context_diff_collected',
717:     payload: {
718:       source: authoritativeDiff?.source ?? null,
719:       artifactId: authoritativeDiff?.artifactId ?? null,
720:       hasDiff: Boolean(diffPatch),
721:       patchBytes: diffPatch ? new TextEncoder().encode(diffPatch).byteLength : 0,
722:     },
723:   });
724: 
725:   await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
726:     reviewId: review.id,
727:     eventType: 'review_context_changed_files_collected',
728:     payload: {
729:       changedFileCount: changedPaths.length,
730:     },
731:   });
732: 
733:   const deploymentSourceBundleKey =
734:     typeof resultArtifact.sourceBundleKey === 'string' && resultArtifact.sourceBundleKey.trim()
735:       ? resultArtifact.sourceBundleKey.trim()
736:       : deployment.sourceBundleKey ?? null;
737:   if (!deploymentSourceBundleKey) {
738:     throw new ReviewContextAssemblyError(
739:       'review_context_source_bundle_missing',
740:       'Review context assembly requires deployment source bundle key.'
741:     );
742:   }
743: 
744:   const changedFileReads = changedPaths.length
745:     ? await readWorkspaceFilesFromSourceBundle(env, {
746:         sourceBundleKey: deploymentSourceBundleKey,
747:         sandboxId: `review-context-${review.id}-changed`,
748:         paths: changedPaths,
749:       })
750:     : [];
751:   const changedFiles = changedFileReads
752:     .filter((item) => item.content !== null && !item.error)
753:     .map((item) => ({
754:       path: item.path,
755:       content: item.content ?? '',
756:       byteSize: item.bytes,
757:       source: 'changed' as const,
758:     }));
759: 
760:   const conventionCandidates = discoverConventionCandidates(changedPaths, CONVENTION_FILE_MAX_COUNT);
761:   const conventionReads = conventionCandidates.length
762:     ? await readWorkspaceFilesFromSourceBundle(env, {
763:         sourceBundleKey: deploymentSourceBundleKey,
764:         sandboxId: `review-context-${review.id}-conventions`,
765:         paths: conventionCandidates,
766:       })
767:     : [];
768:   const conventionFiles = conventionReads
769:     .filter((item) => item.content !== null && !item.error)
770:     .slice(0, CONVENTION_FILE_MAX_COUNT)
771:     .map((item) => ({
772:       path: item.path,
773:       content: item.content ?? '',
774:       byteSize: item.bytes,
775:       source: 'convention' as const,
776:     }));
777: 
778:   await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
779:     reviewId: review.id,
780:     eventType: 'review_context_conventions_collected',
781:     payload: {
782:       candidateCount: conventionCandidates.length,
783:       conventionFileCount: conventionFiles.length,
784:       maxCount: CONVENTION_FILE_MAX_COUNT,
785:     },
786:   });
787: 
788:   const repoSlug =
789:     readOptionalString(requestProvenance.repo) ??
790:     readOptionalString(requestProvenance.repository) ??
791:     readOptionalString(env.REVIEW_CONTEXT_REPO);
792:   if (!repoSlug) {
793:     throw new ReviewContextAssemblyError(
794:       'unsupported_without_entire_checkpoint_context',
795:       'Review context assembly requires repository slug in deployment provenance (provenance.repo).'
796:     );
797:   }
798:   let relatedFiles: Array<{
799:     path: string;
800:     content: string;
801:     byteSize: number;
802:     source: 'related';
803:     score: number;
804:     coChangeFrequency: number;
805:     supportingSessionIds: string[];
806:   }> = [];
807:   let sessionsScanned = 0;
808:   await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
809:     reviewId: review.id,
810:     eventType: 'review_context_cochange_lookup_started',
811:     payload: {
812:       repo: repoSlug,
813:       lookbackSessions: COCHANGE_LOOKBACK_SESSIONS,
814:     },
815:   });
816: 
817:   const relatedFrequency = new Map<string, { frequency: number; sessionIds: string[] }>();
818:   for (const changedPath of changedPaths) {
819:     const cached = await getReviewCochangeCache(env.DB, {
820:       filePath: changedPath,
821:       repo: repoSlug,
822:     });
823:     let entries = cached?.cochange;
824:     const cachedLookbackSessions = cached?.lookbackSessions ?? null;
825:     if (!entries || cachedLookbackSessions !== COCHANGE_LOOKBACK_SESSIONS) {
826:       const fetched = await fetchCochangeFromCheckpointBranch(repoSlug, [changedPath], COCHANGE_LOOKBACK_SESSIONS);
827:       entries = fetched.related;
828:       sessionsScanned += fetched.sessionsScanned;
829:       await upsertReviewCochangeCache(env.DB, {
830:         filePath: changedPath,
831:         repo: repoSlug,
832:         branch: 'entire/checkpoints/v1',
833:         cochange: entries,
834:         lookbackSessions: COCHANGE_LOOKBACK_SESSIONS,
835:       });
836:     }
837: 
838:     for (const entry of entries) {
839:       const existing = relatedFrequency.get(entry.path) ?? { frequency: 0, sessionIds: [] };
840:       existing.frequency += entry.frequency;
841:       existing.sessionIds = Array.from(new Set([...existing.sessionIds, ...entry.sessionIds]));
842:       relatedFrequency.set(entry.path, existing);
843:     }
844:   }
845: 
846:   const rankedRelated = Array.from(relatedFrequency.entries())
847:     .map(([path, value]) => ({ path, ...value }))
848:     .sort((left, right) => right.frequency - left.frequency)
849:     .slice(0, COCHANGE_TOP_N);
850: 
851:   const relatedReads = rankedRelated.length
852:     ? await readWorkspaceFilesFromSourceBundle(env, {
853:         sourceBundleKey: deploymentSourceBundleKey,
854:         sandboxId: `review-context-${review.id}-related`,
855:         paths: rankedRelated.map((item) => item.path),
856:       })
857:     : [];
858:   const readByPath = new Map(relatedReads.map((item) => [item.path, item]));
859:   relatedFiles = rankedRelated
860:     .flatMap((item) => {
861:       const read = readByPath.get(item.path);
862:       if (!read || read.content === null || read.error) {
863:         return [];
864:       }
865:       return [
866:         {
867:           path: item.path,
868:           content: read.content,
869:           byteSize: read.bytes,
870:           source: 'related' as const,
871:           score: item.frequency,
872:           coChangeFrequency: item.frequency,
873:           supportingSessionIds: item.sessionIds,
874:         },
875:       ];
876:     });
877: 
878:   await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
879:     reviewId: review.id,
880:     eventType: 'review_context_cochange_lookup_completed',
881:     payload: {
882:       repo: repoSlug,
883:       relatedFileCount: relatedFiles.length,
884:       topN: COCHANGE_TOP_N,
885:     },
886:   });
887: 
888:   const assembledAt = new Date().toISOString();
889:   const contextId = generateReviewContextId();
890:   const contextPayload: ReviewContext = {
891:     id: contextId,
892:     reviewId: review.id,
893:     workspaceId: review.workspaceId,
894:     deploymentId: review.deploymentId,
895:     commitSha: workspace?.commitSha ?? '',
896:     assembledAt,
897:     checkpoint: {
898:       checkpointId,
899:       branch: 'entire/checkpoints/v1',
900:       attributionTrailer,
901:       session: {
902:         sessionId,
903:         agentType,
904:         sessionIntent,
905:       },
906:     },
907:     retrieval: {
908:       changedFiles,
909:       diffHunks,
910:       relatedFiles,
911:       conventionFiles,
912:       coChange: {
913:         source: 'entire/checkpoints/v1',
914:         lookbackSessions: COCHANGE_LOOKBACK_SESSIONS,
915:         sessionsScanned,
916:         filesConsidered: changedPaths.length,
917:         topN: COCHANGE_TOP_N,
918:       },
919:     },
920:     stats: {
921:       totalFilesIncluded: changedFiles.length + relatedFiles.length + conventionFiles.length,
922:       totalBytesIncluded:
923:         changedFiles.reduce((total, item) => total + item.byteSize, 0) +
924:         relatedFiles.reduce((total, item) => total + item.byteSize, 0) +
925:         conventionFiles.reduce((total, item) => total + item.byteSize, 0),
926:       estimatedTokens: estimateTokenCount([
927:         diffPatch ?? '',
928:         ...changedFiles.map((item) => item.content),
929:         ...relatedFiles.map((item) => item.content),
930:         ...conventionFiles.map((item) => item.content),
931:       ]),
932:       tokenBudget,
933:     },
934:   };
935: 
936:   await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
937:     reviewId: review.id,
938:     eventType: 'review_context_budget_checked',
939:     payload: {
940:       estimatedTokens: contextPayload.stats.estimatedTokens,
941:       tokenBudget,
942:       exceeded: tokenBudget !== null && contextPayload.stats.estimatedTokens > tokenBudget,
943:     },
944:   });
945: 
946:   if (tokenBudget !== null && contextPayload.stats.estimatedTokens > tokenBudget) {
947:     throw new ReviewContextAssemblyError(
948:       'review_context_budget_exceeded',
949:       `ReviewContext estimated token usage (${contextPayload.stats.estimatedTokens}) exceeds configured budget (${tokenBudget}). Increase the budget and retry.`
950:     );
951:   }
952: 
953:   const storageBucketCandidates = [env.REVIEW_CONTEXTS, env.WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS, env.SOURCE_BUNDLES];
954:   const storageBucket = storageBucketCandidates.find(
955:     (bucket): bucket is R2Bucket => Boolean(bucket && typeof bucket.put === 'function')
956:   );
957:   if (!storageBucket) {
958:     throw new ReviewContextAssemblyError(
959:       'review_context_storage_unavailable',
960:       'REVIEW_CONTEXTS, WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS, or SOURCE_BUNDLES R2 binding is required for review context assembly.'
961:     );
962:   }
963: 
964:   const r2Key = `review-context/${review.id}/${contextId}.json`;
965:   const serialized = JSON.stringify(contextPayload);
966:   await storageBucket.put(r2Key, serialized, {
967:     httpMetadata: {
968:       contentType: 'application/json',
969:     },
970:   });
971:   const ref = await createReviewContextBlobReference(env.DB, {
972:     id: contextId,
973:     reviewId: review.id,
974:     workspaceId: review.workspaceId,
975:     deploymentId: review.deploymentId,
976:     r2Key,
977:     byteSize: new TextEncoder().encode(serialized).byteLength,
978:     estimatedTokens: contextPayload.stats.estimatedTokens,
979:   });
980: 
981:   await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
982:     reviewId: review.id,
983:     eventType: 'review_context_stored',
984:     payload: {
985:       contextId: ref.id,
986:       r2Key: ref.r2Key,
987:       totalFilesIncluded: contextPayload.stats.totalFilesIncluded,
988:       totalBytesIncluded: contextPayload.stats.totalBytesIncluded,
989:       estimatedTokens: contextPayload.stats.estimatedTokens,
990:     },
991:   });
992: 
993:   await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
994:     reviewId: review.id,
995:     eventType: 'review_context_assembly_succeeded',
996:     payload: {
997:       checkpointId,
998:       sessionId,
999:       changedFileCount: changedPaths.length,
1000:       contextId: ref.id,
1001:     },
1002:   });
1003: 
1004:   return contextPayload;
1005: }
1006: 
1007: async function loadAuthoritativeDeploymentDiff(
1008:   env: Env,
1009:   workspaceId: string,
1010:   operationId: string | null,
1011:   reviewDiffArtifactId: string | null
1012: ): Promise<{ source: 'artifact_patch'; artifactId: string; patch: string } | null> {
1013:   const getArtifactObject = async (objectKey: string): Promise<R2ObjectBody | null> => {
1014:     const fromArtifacts = env.WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS ? await env.WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS.get(objectKey) : null;
1015:     if (fromArtifacts) {
1016:       return fromArtifacts;
1017:     }
1018:     return env.SOURCE_BUNDLES ? await env.SOURCE_BUNDLES.get(objectKey) : null;
1019:   };
1020: 
1021:   if (reviewDiffArtifactId) {
1022:     const reviewArtifact = await getWorkspaceArtifactById(env.DB, workspaceId, reviewDiffArtifactId);
1023:     if (reviewArtifact && reviewArtifact.artifact.type === 'patch') {
1024:       const object = await getArtifactObject(reviewArtifact.objectKey);
1025:       if (!object) {
1026:         return null;
1027:       }
1028:       return {
1029:         source: 'artifact_patch',
1030:         artifactId: reviewDiffArtifactId,
1031:         patch: await object.text(),
1032:       };
1033:     }
1034:   }
1035: 
1036:   if (!operationId) {
1037:     return null;
1038:   }
1039: 
1040:   const operation = await getWorkspaceOperation(env.DB, workspaceId, operationId);
1041:   if (!operation || operation.type !== 'export_patch' || operation.status !== 'succeeded') {
1042:     return null;
1043:   }
1044: 
1045:   const result = asRecord(operation.result);
1046:   const artifactId = typeof result.artifactId === 'string' ? result.artifactId.trim() : '';
1047:   if (!artifactId) {
1048:     return null;
1049:   }
1050: 
1051:   const artifact = await getWorkspaceArtifactById(env.DB, workspaceId, artifactId);
1052:   if (!artifact || artifact.artifact.type !== 'patch') {
1053:     return null;
1054:   }
1055: 
1056:   const object = await getArtifactObject(artifact.objectKey);
1057:   if (!object) {
1058:     return null;
1059:   }
1060: 
1061:   return {
1062:     source: 'artifact_patch',
1063:     artifactId,
1064:     patch: await object.text(),
1065:   };
1066: }
1067: 
1068: async function buildWorkspaceDeploymentReport(
1069:   env: Env,
1070:   review: ReviewRunResponse,
1071:   payload: Record<string, unknown>,
1072:   reviewContext: ReviewContext
1073: ): Promise<ReviewReport> {
1074:   const deployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, review.workspaceId, review.deploymentId);
1075:   if (!deployment) {
1076:     throw new Error(`Deployment not found for review target ${review.deploymentId}`);
1077:   }
1078: 
1079:   const deploymentRequest = (await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, review.deploymentId)) ?? {};
1080:   const deploymentEvents = await listWorkspaceDeploymentEvents(env.DB, review.workspaceId, review.deploymentId, 0, 500);
1081:   const reviewPolicy = asRecord(payload.policy);
1082:   const reviewFormat = asRecord(payload.format);
1083:   const result = asRecord(deployment.result);
1084:   const resultProvenance = asRecord(result.provenance);
1085:   const resultArtifact = asRecord(result.artifact);
1086:   const requestValidation = asRecord(deploymentRequest.validation);
1087:   const requestProvenance = asRecord(deploymentRequest.provenance);
1088:   const intentSessionContext = uniqueStrings(parseStringArray(requestProvenance.intentSessionContext)).slice(0, 8);
1089:   const provenanceTaskId = typeof resultProvenance.taskId === 'string'
1090:     ? resultProvenance.taskId
1091:     : typeof requestProvenance.taskId === 'string'
1092:       ? requestProvenance.taskId
1093:       : null;
1094:   const provenanceTask = provenanceTaskId ? await getWorkspaceTask(env.DB, review.workspaceId, provenanceTaskId) : null;
1095:   const taskResult = asRecord(provenanceTask?.result);
1096:   const severityThreshold = typeof reviewPolicy.severityThreshold === 'string' ? reviewPolicy.severityThreshold : 'low';
1097:   const maxFindings = parsePositiveInteger(reviewPolicy.maxFindings, 100, 500);
1098:   const includeProvenance = parseBoolean(reviewPolicy.includeProvenance, true);
1099:   const includeValidationEvidence = parseBoolean(reviewPolicy.includeValidationEvidence, true);
1100:   const includeMarkdownSummary = parseBoolean(reviewFormat.includeMarkdownSummary, true);
1101: 
1102:   const baseGoal =
1103:     typeof provenanceTask?.prompt === 'string' && provenanceTask.prompt.trim()
1104:       ? provenanceTask.prompt.trim()
1105:       : typeof requestProvenance.note === 'string' && requestProvenance.note.trim()
1106:         ? requestProvenance.note.trim()
1107:       : `Assess workspace deployment ${review.deploymentId} for review-first handoff readiness.`;
1108:   const baseConstraints = [
1109:     'Non-mutating review only.',
1110:     `Target limited to ${review.target.type}.`,
1111:     requestValidation.runTestsIfPresent === false
1112:       ? 'Tests were not required during deployment validation.'
1113:       : 'Tests were eligible during deployment validation.',
1114:     requestValidation.runBuildIfPresent === false
1115:       ? 'Build validation was not required during deployment validation.'
1116:       : 'Build validation was eligible during deployment validation.',
1117:   ];
1118:   const baseDecisions = [
1119:     `Deployment provider: ${deployment.provider}.`,
1120:     `Review mode: ${review.mode}.`,
1121:     provenanceTask ? `Source task model: ${provenanceTask.model}.` : '',
1122:     typeof taskResult.summary === 'string' && taskResult.summary.trim() ? `Source task summary: ${taskResult.summary.trim()}.` : '',
1123:     typeof resultProvenance.trigger === 'string'
1124:       ? `Deployment trigger: ${resultProvenance.trigger}.`
1125:       : typeof requestProvenance.trigger === 'string'
1126:         ? `Deployment trigger: ${requestProvenance.trigger}.`
1127:         : 'Deployment trigger was not recorded.',
1128:     parseStringArray(requestProvenance.sessionIds).length > 0
1129:       ? `Related Entire sessions: ${parseStringArray(requestProvenance.sessionIds).join(', ')}.`
1130:       : '',
1131:     intentSessionContext.length > 0 ? `Prompt-history context excerpts provided: ${intentSessionContext.length}.` : '',
1132:   ];
1133: 
1134:   const heuristicFindings = buildHeuristicFindings(review, deploymentEvents);
1135:   const analysisEvidence = buildEvidence(deploymentEvents, deployment, resultArtifact, true);
1136:   const provenanceOperationId = typeof resultProvenance.operationId === 'string'
1137:     ? resultProvenance.operationId
1138:     : typeof requestProvenance.operationId === 'string'
1139:       ? requestProvenance.operationId
1140:       : null;
1141:   const reviewDiffArtifactId = typeof resultArtifact.reviewDiffArtifactId === 'string'
1142:     ? resultArtifact.reviewDiffArtifactId
1143:     : typeof resultProvenance.reviewDiffArtifactId === 'string'
1144:       ? resultProvenance.reviewDiffArtifactId
1145:       : typeof requestProvenance.reviewDiffArtifactId === 'string'
1146:         ? requestProvenance.reviewDiffArtifactId
1147:         : null;
1148:   const authoritativeDiff = await loadAuthoritativeDeploymentDiff(
1149:     env,
1150:     review.workspaceId,
1151:     provenanceOperationId,
1152:     reviewDiffArtifactId
1153:   );
1154:   let agentAnalysis: Awaited<ReturnType<typeof runWorkspaceDeploymentAgentAnalysis>> = null;
1155:   const reviewAgentEnabled = Boolean((env.AGENT_SDK_URL ?? '').trim());
1156:   const deploymentSourceBundleKey =
1157:     typeof resultArtifact.sourceBundleKey === 'string' && resultArtifact.sourceBundleKey.trim()
1158:       ? resultArtifact.sourceBundleKey.trim()
1159:       : deployment.sourceBundleKey ?? null;
1160:   try {
1161:     const promptGoal = provenanceTask?.prompt?.trim() || baseGoal;
1162:     if (reviewAgentEnabled && deploymentSourceBundleKey) {
1163:       await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
1164:         reviewId: review.id,
1165:         eventType: 'review_analysis_agent_started',
1166:         payload: {
1167:           provider: 'cloudflare_agents_sdk',
1168:           model: (env.AGENT_MODEL ?? 'claude-3-7-sonnet').trim() || 'claude-3-7-sonnet',
1169:         },
1170:       });
1171:     }
1172:     if (reviewAgentEnabled && deploymentSourceBundleKey) {
1173:       agentAnalysis = await runWorkspaceDeploymentAgentAnalysis(env, {
1174:         reviewId: review.id,
1175:         workspaceId: review.workspaceId,
1176:         deploymentId: review.deploymentId,
1177:         deploymentSandboxId: `review-snapshot-${review.id}`,
1178:         sourceBundleKey: deploymentSourceBundleKey,
1179:         authoritativeDiffSnapshot: authoritativeDiff
1180:           ? {
1181:         source: authoritativeDiff.source,
1182:         artifactId: authoritativeDiff.artifactId,
1183:         patch: authoritativeDiff.patch,
1184:       }
1185:           : undefined,
1186:         goal: promptGoal,
1187:         constraints: baseConstraints,
1188:         decisions: baseDecisions.filter(Boolean),
1189:         intentSessionContext,
1190:         evidenceCatalog: analysisEvidence.map((item) => ({
1191:           id: item.id,
1192:           type: item.type,
1193:           label: item.label,
1194:           status: item.status,
1195:         })),
1196:         deploymentSummary: {
1197:           provider: deployment.provider,
1198:           deployedUrl: deployment.deployedUrl,
1199:           validationSummary: JSON.stringify(requestValidation),
1200:         },
1201:         rootListing: {},
1202:         diffSnapshot: {},
1203:       });
1204:     }
1205:     if (agentAnalysis) {
1206:       await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
1207:         reviewId: review.id,
1208:         eventType: 'review_analysis_agent_completed',
1209:         payload: {
1210:           provider: agentAnalysis.provider,
1211:           model: agentAnalysis.model,
1212:           stepsExecuted: agentAnalysis.stepsExecuted,
1213:           findingCount: agentAnalysis.findings.length,
1214:         },
1215:       });
1216:     } else if (reviewAgentEnabled && !deploymentSourceBundleKey) {
1217:       await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
1218:         reviewId: review.id,
1219:         eventType: 'review_analysis_fallback',
1220:         payload: {
1221:           message: 'Deployment snapshot unavailable; skipping agent analysis',
1222:         },
1223:       });
1224:     }
1225:   } catch (error) {
1226:     const message = formatReviewAnalysisError(error);
1227:     await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
1228:       reviewId: review.id,
1229:       eventType: 'review_analysis_fallback',
1230:       payload: {
1231:         message,
1232:       },
1233:     });
1234:   }
1235: 
1236:   const severityFloor = REVIEW_SEVERITY_RANK[severityThreshold as ReviewSeverity] ?? REVIEW_SEVERITY_RANK.low;
1237:   const mergedFindings = mergeFindings(agentAnalysis?.findings ?? [], heuristicFindings)
1238:     .filter((finding) => REVIEW_SEVERITY_RANK[finding.severity] >= severityFloor)
1239:     .sort((left, right) => REVIEW_SEVERITY_RANK[right.severity] - REVIEW_SEVERITY_RANK[left.severity])
1240:     .slice(0, maxFindings);
1241:   const agentEvidence = agentAnalysis
1242:     ? {
1243:         id: 'ev_review_agent',
1244:         type: 'analysis_agent',
1245:         label: `AI review analysis via ${agentAnalysis.provider}`,
1246:         status: 'info' as const,
1247:         metadata: {
1248:           model: agentAnalysis.model,
1249:           stepsExecuted: agentAnalysis.stepsExecuted,
1250:           usedTools: agentAnalysis.usedTools,
1251:         },
1252:       }
1253:     : null;
1254:   const evidence = buildEvidence(deploymentEvents, deployment, resultArtifact, includeValidationEvidence, agentEvidence);
1255:   const evidenceIds = new Set(evidence.map((item) => item.id));
1256:   const findings = mergedFindings.map((finding) => ({
1257:     ...finding,
1258:     evidenceRefs: finding.evidenceRefs.filter((reference) => evidenceIds.has(reference)),
1259:   }));
1260: 
1261:   const riskLevel = deriveRiskLevel(findings, 'low');
1262:   const recommendation = deriveRecommendation(findings);
1263:   const summary = {
1264:     riskLevel,
1265:     findingCounts: {
1266:       critical: findings.filter((finding) => finding.severity === 'critical').length,
1267:       high: findings.filter((finding) => finding.severity === 'high').length,
1268:       medium: findings.filter((finding) => finding.severity === 'medium').length,
1269:       low: findings.filter((finding) => finding.severity === 'low').length,
1270:     },
1271:     recommendation,
1272:   };
1273: 
1274:   const intent = sanitizeIntentBlock({
1275:     goal: agentAnalysis?.intent?.goal ?? baseGoal,
1276:     constraints: Array.from(new Set([...(agentAnalysis?.intent?.constraints ?? []), ...baseConstraints])),
1277:     decisions: Array.from(new Set([...(agentAnalysis?.intent?.decisions ?? []), ...baseDecisions])),
1278:   });
1279: 
1280:   const promptSummary = redactReviewText(
1281:     (typeof requestProvenance.note === 'string' ? requestProvenance.note.trim() : null) ||
1282:       `Review generated in ${review.mode} mode for deployment ${review.deploymentId}.`
1283:   );
1284:   const transcriptUrl =
1285:     typeof requestProvenance.transcriptUrl === 'string' && requestProvenance.transcriptUrl.trim()
1286:       ? requestProvenance.transcriptUrl.trim()
1287:       : null;
1288: 
1289:   const report: ReviewReport = {
1290:     summary,
1291:     findings,
1292:     intent,
1293:     evidence,
1294:     provenance: includeProvenance
1295:       ? {
1296:           sessionIds: parseStringArray(requestProvenance.sessionIds),
1297:           promptSummary,
1298:           transcriptUrl,
1299:           reviewContextRef: {
1300:             id: reviewContext.id,
1301:             r2Key: `review-context/${review.id}/${reviewContext.id}.json`,
1302:           },
1303:           reviewContextStats: {
1304:             totalFilesIncluded: reviewContext.stats.totalFilesIncluded,
1305:             totalBytesIncluded: reviewContext.stats.totalBytesIncluded,
1306:             estimatedTokens: reviewContext.stats.estimatedTokens,
1307:             tokenBudget: reviewContext.stats.tokenBudget,
1308:           },
1309:         }
1310:       : {
1311:           sessionIds: [],
1312:           promptSummary: null,
1313:           transcriptUrl: null,
1314:           reviewContextRef: {
1315:             id: reviewContext.id,
1316:             r2Key: `review-context/${review.id}/${reviewContext.id}.json`,
1317:           },
1318:           reviewContextStats: {
1319:             totalFilesIncluded: reviewContext.stats.totalFilesIncluded,
1320:             totalBytesIncluded: reviewContext.stats.totalBytesIncluded,
1321:             estimatedTokens: reviewContext.stats.estimatedTokens,
1322:             tokenBudget: reviewContext.stats.tokenBudget,
1323:           },
1324:         },
1325:     markdownSummary: null,
1326:   };
1327:   if (includeMarkdownSummary) {
1328:     report.markdownSummary = buildReviewMarkdown(report);
1329:   }
1330:   return report;
1331: }
1332: 
1333: async function executeReviewRun(
1334:   env: Env,
1335:   review: ReviewRunResponse,
1336:   payload: Record<string, unknown>,
1337:   reviewContext: ReviewContext
1338: ): Promise<ReviewReport> {
1339:   await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
1340:     reviewId: review.id,
1341:     eventType: 'review_preflight_started',
1342:     payload: {
1343:       targetType: review.target.type,
1344:       mode: review.mode,
1345:     },
1346:   });
1347:   await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
1348:     reviewId: review.id,
1349:     eventType: 'review_preflight_completed',
1350:     payload: {
1351:       ok: true,
1352:     },
1353:   });
1354:   await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
1355:     reviewId: review.id,
1356:     eventType: 'review_analysis_started',
1357:     payload: {
1358:       deploymentId: review.deploymentId,
1359:       workspaceId: review.workspaceId,
1360:     },
1361:   });
1362: 
1363:   const target = asRecord(payload.target);
1364:   const targetType = typeof target.type === 'string' ? target.type : review.target.type;
1365:   if (targetType !== 'workspace_deployment') {
1366:     throw new Error(`Unsupported review target type: ${targetType}`);
1367:   }
1368: 
1369:   const report = await buildWorkspaceDeploymentReport(env, review, payload, reviewContext);
1370:   for (const finding of report.findings) {
1371:     await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
1372:       reviewId: review.id,
1373:       eventType: 'review_finding_emitted',
1374:       payload: {
1375:         findingId: finding.id,
1376:         severity: finding.severity,
1377:         confidence: finding.confidence,
1378:         title: finding.title,
1379:       },
1380:     });
1381:   }
1382: 
1383:   return report;
1384: }
1385: 
1386: export async function processReviewRun(env: Env, reviewId: string): Promise<void> {
1387:   const claimed = await claimReviewRunForExecution(env.DB, reviewId);
1388:   if (!claimed) {
1389:     const existing = await getReviewRun(env.DB, reviewId);
1390:     if (existing?.status === 'running') {
1391:       throw new QueueRetryError('Review run is already running; defer redelivery');
1392:     }
1393:     return;
1394:   }
1395: 
1396:   let review: ReviewRunResponse | null = null;
1397:   try {
1398:     review = await getReviewRun(env.DB, reviewId);
1399:     if (!review) {
1400:       return;
1401:     }
1402: 
1403:     const payload = await getReviewRunRequestPayload(env.DB, reviewId);
1404:     if (!payload) {
1405:       await updateReviewRunStatus(env.DB, reviewId, 'failed', {
1406:         errorCode: 'review_not_found',
1407:         errorMessage: 'Review request payload no longer exists',
1408:       });
1409:       await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
1410:         reviewId,
1411:         eventType: 'review_failed',
1412:         payload: {
1413:           code: 'review_not_found',
1414:           message: 'Review request payload no longer exists',
1415:         },
1416:       });
1417:       return;
1418:     }
1419: 
1420:     const reviewContext = await assembleReviewContextBootstrap(env, review);
1421:     const report = await executeReviewRun(env, review, payload, reviewContext);
1422:     await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
1423:       reviewId,
1424:       eventType: 'review_finalize_started',
1425:       payload: {
1426:         findingCount: report.findings.length,
1427:       },
1428:     });
1429:     await replaceReviewFindings(env.DB, reviewId, report.findings);
1430:     await updateReviewRunStatus(env.DB, reviewId, 'succeeded', {
1431:       report,
1432:       markdownSummary: report.markdownSummary,
1433:       errorCode: null,
1434:       errorMessage: null,
1435:     });
1436:     await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
1437:       reviewId,
1438:       eventType: 'review_succeeded',
1439:       payload: {
1440:         recommendation: report.summary.recommendation,
1441:         findingCount: report.findings.length,
1442:       },
1443:     });
1444:   } catch (error) {
1445:     const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
1446:     const latest = await getReviewRun(env.DB, reviewId);
1447:     const attemptCount = latest?.attemptCount ?? review?.attemptCount ?? 0;
1448: 
1449:     if ((error instanceof QueueRetryError || transientReviewFailure(message)) && attemptCount <= REVIEW_MAX_RETRIES) {
1450:       await replaceReviewFindings(env.DB, reviewId, []);
1451:       await updateReviewRunStatus(env.DB, reviewId, 'queued', {
1452:         report: null,
1453:         markdownSummary: null,
1454:         startedAt: null,
1455:         finishedAt: null,
1456:         errorCode: 'retry_scheduled',
1457:         errorMessage: message,
1458:       });
1459:       await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
1460:         reviewId,
1461:         eventType: 'review_retry_scheduled',
1462:         payload: {
1463:           attemptCount,
1464:           maxRetries: REVIEW_MAX_RETRIES,
1465:         },
1466:       });
1467:       throw new QueueRetryError('Review transient failure; retry requested');
1468:     }
1469: 
1470:     const contextAssemblyErrorCode = error instanceof ReviewContextAssemblyError ? error.code : null;
1471:     const finalErrorCode = contextAssemblyErrorCode ?? 'review_execution_failed';
1472:     await updateReviewRunStatus(env.DB, reviewId, 'failed', {
1473:       errorCode: finalErrorCode,
1474:       errorMessage: message,
1475:     });
1476:     try {
1477:       if (contextAssemblyErrorCode) {
1478:         await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
1479:           reviewId,
1480:           eventType: 'review_context_assembly_failed',
1481:           payload: {
1482:             code: contextAssemblyErrorCode,
1483:             message,
1484:           },
1485:         });
1486:       }
1487:       await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
1488:         reviewId,
1489:         eventType: 'review_failed',
1490:         payload: {
1491:           code: finalErrorCode,
1492:           message,
1493:         },
1494:       });
1495:     } catch {
1496:       // Best-effort terminal event.
1497:     }
1498:   }
1499: }
1500: 
1501: export async function runReviewInlineWithRetries(env: Env, reviewId: string, maxCycles = 4): Promise<void> {
1502:   for (let cycle = 0; cycle < maxCycles; cycle += 1) {
1503:     try {
1504:       await processReviewRun(env, reviewId);
1505:     } catch {
1506:       // Retry scheduling is inferred from persisted status.
1507:     }
1508: 
1509:     const latest = await getReviewRun(env.DB, reviewId);
1510:     if (!latest) {
1511:       return;
1512:     }
1513:     if (latest.status !== 'queued') {
1514:       return;

2125:         input.workspaceId,
2126:         input.idempotencyKey,
2127:         input.id,
2128:         input.requestPayloadSha256,
2129:         expiresAt
2130:       )
2131:       .run();
2132:   } catch (error) {
2133:     if (!isUniqueConstraintError(error)) {
2134:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_deployments WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
2135:       throw error;
2136:     }
2137: 
2138:     const concurrent = await db
2139:       .prepare(
2140:         `SELECT deployment_id, request_payload_sha256, expires_at
2141:          FROM workspace_deployment_idempotency
2142:          WHERE workspace_id = ? AND idempotency_key = ?
2143:          LIMIT 1`
2144:       )
2145:       .bind(input.workspaceId, input.idempotencyKey)
2146:       .first<{ deployment_id: string; request_payload_sha256: string; expires_at: string }>();
2147: 
2148:     if (!concurrent || concurrent.expires_at <= now) {
2149:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_deployments WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
2150:       throw new Error('Deployment idempotency race detected but winner record is unavailable');
2151:     }
2152: 
2153:     if (concurrent.request_payload_sha256 !== input.requestPayloadSha256) {
2154:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_deployments WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
2155:       throw new WorkspaceDeploymentIdempotencyConflictError(input.idempotencyKey);
2156:     }
2157: 
2158:     const existingDeployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(db, input.workspaceId, concurrent.deployment_id);
2159:     if (!existingDeployment) {
2160:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_deployments WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
2161:       throw new Error(`Idempotency record references missing deployment ${concurrent.deployment_id}`);
2162:     }
2163: 
2164:     await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_deployments WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
2165:     return { deployment: existingDeployment, reused: true };
2166:   }
2167: 
2168:   return { deployment: toWorkspaceDeploymentResponse(deploymentRecord), reused: false };
2169: }

2233: export async function updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(
2234:   db: D1Database,
2235:   deploymentId: string,
2236:   status: WorkspaceDeploymentStatus,
2237:   options?: {
2238:     workspaceId?: string;
2239:     result?: unknown;
2240:     toolchain?: WorkspaceToolchainProfile | null;
2241:     dependencyCacheKey?: string | null;
2242:     dependencyCacheHit?: boolean;
2243:     remediations?: WorkspaceDeploymentRemediation[];
2244:     errorCode?: string | null;
2245:     errorMessage?: string | null;
2246:     sourceSnapshotSha256?: string | null;
2247:     sourceBundleKey?: string | null;
2248:     deployedUrl?: string | null;
2249:     providerDeploymentId?: string | null;
2250:     cancelRequestedAt?: string | null;
2251:     startedAt?: string | null;
2252:     finishedAt?: string | null;
2253:   }
2254: ): Promise<void> {
2255:   const updates: string[] = ['status = ?', 'updated_at = ?'];
2256:   const values: Array<string | number | null> = [status, new Date().toISOString()];
2257:   let explicitFinishedAt: string | null | undefined;
2258: 
2259:   if (options?.startedAt !== undefined) {
2260:     updates.push('started_at = ?');
2261:     values.push(options.startedAt);
2262:   }
2263:   if (options?.finishedAt !== undefined) {
2264:     updates.push('finished_at = ?');
2265:     values.push(options.finishedAt);
2266:     explicitFinishedAt = options.finishedAt;
2267:   }
2268:   if (options?.result !== undefined) {
2269:     updates.push('result_json = ?');
2270:     values.push(JSON.stringify(options.result));
2271:   }
2272:   if (options?.toolchain !== undefined) {
2273:     updates.push('toolchain_json = ?');
2274:     values.push(options.toolchain ? JSON.stringify(options.toolchain) : null);
2275:   }
2276:   if (options?.dependencyCacheKey !== undefined) {
2277:     updates.push('dependency_cache_key = ?');
2278:     values.push(options.dependencyCacheKey);
2279:   }
2280:   if (options?.dependencyCacheHit !== undefined) {
2281:     updates.push('dependency_cache_hit = ?');
2282:     values.push(options.dependencyCacheHit ? 1 : 0);
2283:   }
2284:   if (options?.remediations !== undefined) {
2285:     updates.push('remediations_json = ?');
2286:     values.push(JSON.stringify(options.remediations));
2287:   }
2288:   if (options?.errorCode !== undefined) {
2289:     updates.push('error_code = ?');
2290:     values.push(options.errorCode);
2291:   }
2292:   if (options?.errorMessage !== undefined) {
2293:     updates.push('error_message = ?');
2294:     values.push(options.errorMessage);
2295:   }
2296:   if (options?.sourceSnapshotSha256 !== undefined) {
2297:     updates.push('source_snapshot_sha256 = ?');
2298:     values.push(options.sourceSnapshotSha256);
2299:   }
2300:   if (options?.sourceBundleKey !== undefined) {
2301:     updates.push('source_bundle_key = ?');
2302:     values.push(options.sourceBundleKey);
2303:   }
2304:   if (options?.deployedUrl !== undefined) {
2305:     updates.push('deployed_url = ?');
2306:     values.push(options.deployedUrl);
2307:   }
2308:   if (options?.providerDeploymentId !== undefined) {
2309:     updates.push('provider_deployment_id = ?');
2310:     values.push(options.providerDeploymentId);
2311:   }
2312:   if (options?.cancelRequestedAt !== undefined) {
2313:     updates.push('cancel_requested_at = ?');
2314:     values.push(options.cancelRequestedAt);
2315:   }
2316: 
2317:   if (status === 'succeeded' || status === 'failed' || status === 'cancelled') {
2318:     const finishedAtForDuration =
2319:       explicitFinishedAt && typeof explicitFinishedAt === 'string' ? explicitFinishedAt : new Date().toISOString();
2320:     if (explicitFinishedAt === undefined) {
2321:       updates.push('finished_at = COALESCE(finished_at, ?)');
2322:       values.push(finishedAtForDuration);
2323:     }
2324:     updates.push('duration_ms = CASE WHEN started_at IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CAST((julianday(?) - julianday(started_at)) * 86400000 AS INTEGER) END');
2325:     values.push(finishedAtForDuration);
2326:   }
2327: 
2328:   values.push(deploymentId);
2329:   let whereClause = 'id = ?';
2330:   if (options?.workspaceId) {
2331:     whereClause += ' AND workspace_id = ?';
2332:     values.push(options.workspaceId);
2333:   }
2334:   if (status === 'running') {
2335:     whereClause += " AND status IN ('queued', 'running')";
2336:   }
2337: 
2338:   await db
2339:     .prepare(`UPDATE workspace_deployments SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE ${whereClause}`)
2340:     .bind(...values)
2341:     .run();
2342: }

2394: export async function requestWorkspaceDeploymentCancel(

2397:   deploymentId: string
2398: ): Promise<{ deployment: WorkspaceDeploymentResponse | null; updated: boolean }> {

2413: 
2414:   const runningResult = await db
2415:     .prepare(

2417:        SET cancel_requested_at = COALESCE(cancel_requested_at, ?),
2418:            updated_at = ?

2432: export async function appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(
