2518: export async function createReviewRun(
2519:   db: D1Database,
2520:   input: CreateReviewRunInput
2521: ): Promise<{ review: ReviewRunResponse; reused: boolean }> {
2522:   const now = new Date().toISOString();
2523:   const acceptedHashes = new Set([input.requestPayloadSha256, ...(input.requestPayloadSha256Aliases ?? [])]);
2524:   const existingIdempotency = await db
2525:     .prepare(
2526:       `SELECT review_id, request_payload_sha256, expires_at
2527:        FROM review_run_idempotency
2528:        WHERE workspace_id = ? AND idempotency_key = ?
2529:        LIMIT 1`
2530:     )
2531:     .bind(input.workspaceId, input.idempotencyKey)
2532:     .first<{ review_id: string; request_payload_sha256: string; expires_at: string }>();
2533: 
2534:   if (existingIdempotency && existingIdempotency.expires_at > now) {
2535:     if (!acceptedHashes.has(existingIdempotency.request_payload_sha256)) {
2536:       throw new ReviewIdempotencyConflictError(input.idempotencyKey);
2537:     }
2538: 
2539:     const existingReview = await getReviewRun(db, existingIdempotency.review_id);
2540:     if (!existingReview) {
2541:       throw new Error(`Idempotency record references missing review ${existingIdempotency.review_id}`);
2542:     }
2543: 
2544:     return { review: existingReview, reused: true };
2545:   }
2546: 
2547:   if (existingIdempotency && existingIdempotency.expires_at <= now) {
2548:     await db
2549:       .prepare('DELETE FROM review_run_idempotency WHERE workspace_id = ? AND idempotency_key = ?')
2550:       .bind(input.workspaceId, input.idempotencyKey)
2551:       .run();
2552:   }
2553: 
2554:   const idempotencyWindowStart = new Date(Date.now() - 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();
2555:   const existingReviewByKey = await db
2556:     .prepare(
2557:       `SELECT *
2558:        FROM review_runs
2559:        WHERE workspace_id = ?
2560:          AND idempotency_key = ?
2561:          AND julianday(created_at) >= julianday(?)
2562:        ORDER BY created_at DESC
2563:        LIMIT 1`
2564:     )
2565:     .bind(input.workspaceId, input.idempotencyKey, idempotencyWindowStart)
2566:     .first<ReviewRunRecord>();
2567: 
2568:   if (existingReviewByKey) {
2569:     if (!acceptedHashes.has(existingReviewByKey.request_payload_sha256)) {
2570:       throw new ReviewIdempotencyConflictError(input.idempotencyKey);
2571:     }
2572: 
2573:     const expiresAt = new Date(Date.now() + 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();
2574:     try {
2575:       await db
2576:         .prepare(
2577:           `INSERT INTO review_run_idempotency (
2578:              id,
2579:              workspace_id,
2580:              idempotency_key,
2581:              review_id,
2582:              request_payload_sha256,
2583:              expires_at
2584:            )
2585:            VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`
2586:         )
2587:         .bind(
2588:           generatePrefixedId('rvid'),
2589:           input.workspaceId,
2590:           input.idempotencyKey,
2591:           existingReviewByKey.id,
2592:           input.requestPayloadSha256,
2593:           expiresAt
2594:         )
2595:         .run();
2596:     } catch (error) {
2597:       if (!isUniqueConstraintError(error)) {
2598:         throw error;
2599:       }
2600:     }
2601: 
2602:     return { review: toReviewRunResponse(existingReviewByKey), reused: true };
2603:   }
2604: 
2605:   const expiresAt = new Date(Date.now() + 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();
2606:   const reviewRecord = await db
2607:     .prepare(
2608:       `INSERT INTO review_runs (
2609:          id,
2610:          workspace_id,
2611:          deployment_id,
2612:          target_type,
2613:          mode,
2614:          status,
2615:          idempotency_key,
2616:          request_payload_json,
2617:          request_payload_sha256,
2618:          provenance_json,
2619:          created_at,
2620:          updated_at
2621:        )
2622:        VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, 'queued', ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
2623:        RETURNING *`
2624:     )
2625:     .bind(
2626:       input.id,
2627:       input.workspaceId,
2628:       input.deploymentId,
2629:       input.targetType,
2630:       input.mode,
2631:       input.idempotencyKey,
2632:       JSON.stringify(input.requestPayload ?? {}),
2633:       input.requestPayloadSha256,
2634:       JSON.stringify(input.provenance ?? {}),
2635:       now,
2636:       now
2637:     )
2638:     .first<ReviewRunRecord>();
2639: 
2640:   if (!reviewRecord) {
2641:     throw new Error('Failed to create review run');
2642:   }
2643: 
2644:   try {
2645:     await db
2646:       .prepare(
2647:         `INSERT INTO review_run_idempotency (
2648:            id,
2649:            workspace_id,
2650:            idempotency_key,
2651:            review_id,
2652:            request_payload_sha256,
2653:            expires_at
2654:          )
2655:          VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`
2656:       )
2657:       .bind(
2658:         generatePrefixedId('rvid'),
2659:         input.workspaceId,
2660:         input.idempotencyKey,
2661:         input.id,
2662:         input.requestPayloadSha256,
2663:         expiresAt
2664:       )
2665:       .run();
2666:   } catch (error) {
2667:     if (!isUniqueConstraintError(error)) {
2668:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM review_runs WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
2669:       throw error;
2670:     }
2671: 
2672:     const concurrent = await db
2673:       .prepare(
2674:         `SELECT review_id, request_payload_sha256, expires_at
2675:          FROM review_run_idempotency
2676:          WHERE workspace_id = ? AND idempotency_key = ?
2677:          LIMIT 1`
2678:       )
2679:       .bind(input.workspaceId, input.idempotencyKey)
2680:       .first<{ review_id: string; request_payload_sha256: string; expires_at: string }>();
2681: 
2682:     if (!concurrent || concurrent.expires_at <= now) {
2683:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM review_runs WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
2684:       throw new Error('Review idempotency race detected but winner record is unavailable');
2685:     }
2686: 
2687:     if (!acceptedHashes.has(concurrent.request_payload_sha256)) {
2688:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM review_runs WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
2689:       throw new ReviewIdempotencyConflictError(input.idempotencyKey);
2690:     }
2691: 
2692:     const existingReview = await getReviewRun(db, concurrent.review_id);
2693:     if (!existingReview) {
2694:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM review_runs WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
2695:       throw new Error(`Idempotency record references missing review ${concurrent.review_id}`);
2696:     }
2697: 
2698:     await db.prepare('DELETE FROM review_runs WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
2699:     return { review: existingReview, reused: true };
2700:   }
2701: 
2702:   return { review: toReviewRunResponse(reviewRecord), reused: false };
2703: }

2714: export async function getReviewRunByIdempotency(

2718:   requestPayloadSha256: string,
2719:   requestPayloadSha256Aliases: string[] = []

2723:   const existingIdempotency = await db
2724:     .prepare(
2725:       `SELECT review_id, request_payload_sha256, expires_at
2726:        FROM review_run_idempotency
2727:        WHERE workspace_id = ? AND idempotency_key = ?
2728:        LIMIT 1`
2729:     )
2730:     .bind(workspaceId, idempotencyKey)
2731:     .first<{ review_id: string; request_payload_sha256: string; expires_at: string }>();
2732: 
2733:   if (existingIdempotency && existingIdempotency.expires_at > now) {
2734:     if (!acceptedHashes.has(existingIdempotency.request_payload_sha256)) {
2735:       throw new ReviewIdempotencyConflictError(idempotencyKey);
2736:     }
2737: 
2738:     const review = await getReviewRun(db, existingIdempotency.review_id);
2739:     if (!review) {
2740:       throw new Error(`Idempotency record references missing review ${existingIdempotency.review_id}`);
2741:     }
2742: 
2743:     return review;
2744:   }
2745: 
2746:   const idempotencyWindowStart = new Date(Date.now() - 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();
2747:   const existingReview = await db
2748:     .prepare(
2749:       `SELECT *
2750:        FROM review_runs
2751:        WHERE workspace_id = ?
2752:          AND idempotency_key = ?
2753:          AND julianday(created_at) >= julianday(?)
2754:        ORDER BY created_at DESC
2755:        LIMIT 1`
2756:     )
2757:     .bind(workspaceId, idempotencyKey, idempotencyWindowStart)
2758:     .first<ReviewRunRecord>();
2759: 
2760:   if (!existingReview) {
2761:     return null;
2762:   }
2763: 
2764:   if (!acceptedHashes.has(existingReview.request_payload_sha256)) {
2765:     throw new ReviewIdempotencyConflictError(idempotencyKey);
2766:   }
2767: 
2768:   return toReviewRunResponse(existingReview);
2769: }

2795: export async function claimReviewRunForExecution(db: D1Database, reviewId: string): Promise<boolean> {
2796:   const now = new Date().toISOString();
2797:   const result = await db
2798:     .prepare(
2799:       `UPDATE review_runs
2800:        SET status = 'running',
2801:            started_at = COALESCE(started_at, ?),
2802:            attempt_count = attempt_count + 1,
2803:            error_code = NULL,
2804:            error_message = NULL,
2805:            updated_at = ?
2806:        WHERE id = ? AND status = 'queued'`
2807:     )
2808:     .bind(now, now, reviewId)
2809:     .run();
2810: 
2811:   return (result.meta?.changes ?? 0) > 0;
2812: }

2814: export async function updateReviewRunStatus(
2815:   db: D1Database,
2816:   reviewId: string,
2817:   status: ReviewRunStatus,
2818:   options?: {
2819:     report?: ReviewReport | null;
2820:     markdownSummary?: string | null;
2821:     errorCode?: string | null;
2822:     errorMessage?: string | null;
2823:     startedAt?: string | null;
2824:     finishedAt?: string | null;
2825:   }
2826: ): Promise<void> {
2827:   const updates: string[] = ['status = ?', 'updated_at = ?'];
2828:   const values: Array<string | null> = [status, new Date().toISOString()];
2829: 
2830:   if (options?.startedAt !== undefined) {
2831:     updates.push('started_at = ?');
2832:     values.push(options.startedAt);
2833:   }
2834:   if (options?.finishedAt !== undefined) {
2835:     updates.push('finished_at = ?');
2836:     values.push(options.finishedAt);
2837:   }
2838:   if (options?.report !== undefined) {
2839:     updates.push('report_json = ?');
2840:     values.push(options.report ? JSON.stringify(options.report) : null);
2841:   }
2842:   if (options?.markdownSummary !== undefined) {
2843:     updates.push('markdown_summary = ?');
2844:     values.push(options.markdownSummary);
2845:   }
2846:   if (options?.errorCode !== undefined) {
2847:     updates.push('error_code = ?');
2848:     values.push(options.errorCode);
2849:   }
2850:   if (options?.errorMessage !== undefined) {
2851:     updates.push('error_message = ?');
2852:     values.push(options.errorMessage);
2853:   }
2854:   if (status === 'succeeded' || status === 'failed' || status === 'cancelled') {
2855:     updates.push('finished_at = COALESCE(finished_at, ?)');
2856:     values.push(new Date().toISOString());
2857:   }
2858: 
2859:   values.push(reviewId);
2860:   await db.prepare(`UPDATE review_runs SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE id = ?`).bind(...values).run();
2861: }

state.title: packages/worker/src/lib/review-runner.ts

parts.text:
**Findings**
- **Medium** `packages/worker/src/lib/review-runner.ts:570`  
  Co-change metadata is fetched with `ref=entire/checkpoints/v1` for every commit, so each lookup reads file contents from branch HEAD instead of the specific commit being scanned. In histories where `metadata.json` changed over time, this produces incorrect co-change frequencies and can rank unrelated files.  
  **Fix:** fetch with `ref=${sha}` (or use the commit blob SHA from commit details) so each metadata file is read at the commit being analyzed.

- **High (private repos / rate-limited environments)** `packages/worker/src/lib/review-runner.ts:499` and `packages/worker/src/lib/review-runner.ts:519`  
  GitHub API calls for co-change retrieval are unauthenticated. For private repos (or when hitting low anonymous rate limits), these calls return 404/403 and fail review context assembly, which then fails the whole review run.  
  **Fix:** support authenticated requests (token from env), and degrade gracefully (skip co-change enrichment) instead of hard-failing review execution when GitHub lookup is unavailable.

- **Medium (certain git remote URL formats)** `packages/cli/src/commands/workspace/deploy.ts:37`  
  Repository slug parsing only handles `https://host/owner/repo` and `git@host:owner/repo`. Common remotes like `ssh://git@github.com/owner/repo.git` are not matched, causing deploy to fail with “Unable to resolve repository slug…” even when `origin` is valid.  
  **Fix:** add parsing for `ssh://` URLs (and optionally normalize additional git URL forms) before failing.
